Dainty Gloves  
 

No Trade
Slot: HANDS
AC: 7
CHA: +20 INT: +10 MANA: +30
WT: 1.0 Size: TINY
Class: BRD ENC
Race: HUM ERU HIE DEF GNM VAH DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Dainty Gloves
No Trade
Slot: HANDS
AC: 7
CHA: +20 INT: +10 MANA: +30
WT: 1.0 Size: TINY
Class: BRD ENC
Race: HUM ERU HIE DEF GNM VAH DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Leather
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):0, 0, 0
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Suladan
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 02:11:49
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Kerafyrm's Lair (Sleeper's Tomb)
NPC Name
Tukaarak the Warder


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Kerafyrm's Lair (Sleeper's Tomb)


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
Worthless
QuoteReply
# Sep 22 2002 at 10:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763587688
144 posts
OMG these gloves suck considering where you are! I mean look at Thurg gloves, Id wear those before these. I wear SS now, and the 35 hp, 10 dex and agi and resists I wouldnt trade for 100 cha. 20 cha is worthless at high end game. I have 244 int and 186 cha self buffed at level 60. I also have 2155 hp and 704 ac self buffed. The 43 pts of Cha and 11 pts int Ive lost switching to AC/HP gear are NOT missed at all. Cha doesn't play as much a part in the mez game as people think, verant has stated so on many occasions. I get about 1 resist in 20 on mezzes in seb, velks, etc. and maybe 1 in 15 in ssra. Throw these gloves away. IF you can get into ST, there aint no way in hell youd wear these cause youre pimped out already.
▲ Page top
RE: Worthless
QuoteReply
# Oct 01 2003 at 9:08 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591772130018
17 posts
Lol at lvl 60 you better only get 1 or 2 resists in seb. Head to BoT (when you get 62 or flaged) and see how long your 186 self buffed cha lasts. Cha does play a big part in mezing . .i def know when my cha buf drops.
▲ Page top
this is not a bard tiem
QuoteReply
# Aug 17 2002 at 5:20 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592252034299
Scholar
25 posts
This is not a nice bard item IMO. It has no HP or ressist. Maybe it could be for those times you want to charmkite, i dont see how it could be usefull in any other way. There is a ton on cha items in game and alot is cheap and have other more better stats than this one. it should have been 1o str 20 cha 50 hp and 10 ressist hehe. Then it would owe




Edited, Sat Aug 17 06:09:17 2002
▲ Page top
RE: this is not a bard tiem
QuoteReply
# Aug 30 2002 at 2:46 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759392552
Scholar
627 posts
a bard fighting above 55+ isn't an effective bard. Bards are int based so the 10 int definately helps along with the 30 mana. Charisma has a direct relation to mezzing, which you will find bards doing just as much when no enchanters are around.

There are tons of other slots to add ac/hp/resists.
▲ Page top
Man!
QuoteReply
# Jan 10 2002 at 3:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965735612
62 posts
Cha-ching!

Nice...

slap those babys down and swap out an int slot for some resist/ac gear.

QuoteReply
# Aug 21 2001 at 5:55 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249894450

▲ Page top
These are awful end game loot.
QuoteReply
# Jul 30 2001 at 5:57 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591753393131
1 post
I got a pair of these last night. I don't see wearing them over my Coldain Skin Gloves or even my Dazzling(Kael) Gloves.

Yes, I suppose the int and cha are nice for enchanters that are running low in those areas, but at the point an enc is capable of getting these gloves int and cha are very much a non issue.

Lumina, 60 Enc
<Vae Inimicus>
▲ Page top
better than this where>?
QuoteReply
# Jul 10 2001 at 5:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591757813834
22 posts
so tell me oh uber ones what is better than this?
for stats i dont see much out there with 20 cha and 10 int ADD 30 mana and WAMMO you got every stat needed covered save one

mr so what gloves have cha int mana and mr rolle dup in one?

I at 51st lvl have seen none of these gloves

course im a newbie so i guess thats why huh

Not So Good
QuoteReply
# Jul 09 2001 at 3:14 PM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
My guild has gotten 5 of these so far and the 2 enchanters and 1 bard present all got one the 1st time though none wanted them as they had better. The next time 2 dropped and rotted.

The problem is that by the time you can get to some places in this game you may already have better equipment.

▲ Page top
RE: settings?
QuoteReply
# Feb 15 2001 at 7:19 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361148198
1 post
You can change it back if you want by going to 640x480 mode.

Halfred Tendonslicer
Halfling Warrior of the 30th rank
